en: Have you been sleeping? Why?
Because I haven't been sleeping.
I really miss Helen.
Maybe I'm coming down with something.
Last night, I was up at 4 in the morning watching
Leave it to Beaver in Spanish. Buenos dias, Senor Cleaver.
ko: 비버의 집을 스페인어로. 안녕하세요, 클리버 씨.

en: Donde esta Wallace y Theodore? I'm not well.
ko: 월리스랑 시어도어는 어디 있어? 나 몸이 안 좋아.

en: Well, I went to bed at 7:30 last night.
I haven't done that since the third grade.
Well, that's the good thing about depression.
You get your rest. I'm not depressed.
ko: 푹 쉴 수 있어. 나는 우울하지 않아.

en: OK, fine.
Do you still sleep on the same side of the bed? I did for a while, but now I'm pretty much using the whole bed.
ko: 여전히 침대의 같은 쪽에서 자? 한동안 그랬지만, 이제는 거의 침대를 다 써.

en: God, that's great.
I feel weird when just my leg wanders over.
I miss her. I don't miss him. I really don't.
ko: 그녀가 그리워. 그는 그리워하지 않아. 정말로.

en: Not even a little?
You know what I miss?
I miss the idea of him.
Maybe I only miss the idea, Helen.
ko: 아마 나는 그 존재만 그리워하는 것 같아, 헬렌.

en: Now I miss the whole Helen.
